name: GA4 Monthly Users (Clean — excludes Smartup TikTok bots)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ dateRanges: [{ startDate: $json.startDate, endDate: $json.endDate }], metrics: [ { name: 'totalUsers' }, { name: 'newUsers' }, { name: 'sessions' }, { name: 'screenPageViews' } ], dimensionFilter: { notExpression: { filter: { fieldName: 'sessionCampaignName', stringFilter: { matchType: 'BEGINS_WITH', value: 'smartup_tiktok_', caseSensitive: false } } } } }) }}
